rent.note: furnished 1BR in nomad area (Shoreditch, Dalston, Brixton); city-center avg £2,218 (~$2,800); Zone 2 ~£1,500-1,700

utilities.note: electric + water + internet; UK energy bills elevated; internet ~£35/mo

diningOut.note: pub lunch ~£12-16, dinner £20-35; London dining is expensive

coworking.note: hot-desk monthly; Zone 2 spaces from £210, central £400-600; mid £250-280

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. London furnished lets are stable year-round for medium-term rentals.

evidence.quote: average monthly rent for a 1-bedroom apartment in the city centre is £2,218, compared to £1,678 outside the centre

evidence.claim: London node-living furnished studio start price
evidence.quote: Fully furnished apartments through Node Living start at £1,650/month for studios and apartments
London TfL (Zone 1-2) monthly costs are estimated at £163.80 via contactless cap

evidence.claim: London coworking monthly hot desk range
evidence.quote: Hot desk/coworking memberships range from £210/month in Zone 2 locations (Stratford, Earlsfield), rising to £400-£600/month for quality spaces in central and inner London
